annotations.label: CLT approximation of sample means

anchor.snippet: sample means of moderately large samples are often well-approximated by a normal distribution

annotations.label: Slutsky's theorem for large samples

annotations.note: Slutsky's theorem itself is formalized, but its specific application to the t-test's large-sample behavior is not.

annotations.label: Law of large numbers for sample variance

anchor.snippet: as per the law of large numbers

annotations.note: Mathlib has the strong law of large numbers, which justifies convergence of the sample variance to its population value.

annotations.label: Welch's t-test statistic
